---
title: "analyze_failures.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\analyze_failures.py"
loc: 43
complexity: 7
logic_score: 3.10
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 5.12
overall_score: 3.58
---

## Intent
The `analyze_failures.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on analyze_benchmarks, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via analyze_benchmarks, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `analyze_benchmarks`
- `main`
